reports.summary: Listing Team EOD - Patricia Shane Celeste - 3.6.2026 Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary: Listing rules and brand exclusion controls were implemented in the Geon production e
reports.rawMessage:
Listing Team EOD - Patricia Shane Celeste - 3.6.2026

Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary:

Listing rules and brand exclusion controls were implemented in the Geon production environment, while database processes were completed for a discontinued unit. Several Amazon listing maintenance tasks were carried out, including relisting affected products, restoring a multi-variation listing format, and ensuring excluded units were fully removed across key EU and US marketplaces. Product listing quality was also improved through image updates and large-scale corrections addressing GPSR, SIPV, and product attribute issues affecting over 1,000 SKUs across North American and European Amazon sites.

*TECHNICAL / TOOLS*
• Deployment of new listing rules and brand exclusions for Amazon US, DE, FR, and IT to the Geon production environment
*DATABASE*
• Discontinued unit HLBWH-NOKIA1 and completed related database processes
*AMAZON*
• Relisting of HLBWH-FIRE on FR
• Restoration of HC-SAM1 multi-variation listing format on US
• Re-check and removal of remaining excluded units across US, DE, FR, and IT marketplaces
• Fix for image update issues affecting NFLSBL60, NFLSBL60S, TP-NBA2LOS, and TP-NBA2NKNLG
• Image updates for HB4-LFCKIT25
• Bulk fixes for GPSR, SIPV, and product attribute misuse affecting 1000+ SKUs across US, UK, DE, FR, IT, ES, NL, SE, PL, and IE

reports.summary: *Listing Team EOD - Mariela Razon - 3.6.2026* Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary: Today, I updated the *Rakuten* device database to include the newly released iPhone 17, ens
reports.rawMessage:
*Listing Team EOD - Mariela Razon - 3.6.2026*  
Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary:
Today, I updated the *Rakuten* device database to include the newly released iPhone 17, ensuring that device compatibility information remains current and accurate within the system. *Quality assurance (QA)* was also conducted for Amazon and eBay product listings prior to upload, verifying that all listing details meet marketplace standards for accuracy. Additionally, *Premium A+* content duplication was carried out for the FR marketplace, covering 118,152 ASINs. Work also began on developing an *AI Tool / QA Amazon Checker tool*, utilizing Claude Code and Antigravity with initial guidance and direction provided by Sir Jay Mark during the development process and I'll add further updates and make it more accurate.

*PREMIUM A+ DUPLICATION*
• FR Brandstory - 118,152 ASINs
*QA AMAZON*
Verifying listings description, price, and titles across UK, US, DE, FR, IT
• NBA #2 HY
• NBA #2 HC
• ERU #24 BC
• ERU #24 B1
• ERU #24 B4
*QA EBAY*
Verifying listings description, price, and titles across AU, UK, US, DE
• NBA #1 LB
• NBA #2 B6
• NBA #2 B7
• NBA #2 LB
• NBA #3 B6
• NBA #3 B7
• NBA #4 B4
• NBA #4 B1
• NBA #4 B1
• NBA #4 LB
*RAKUTEN LICENSE (Updated with iPhone 17 device for HTPCR/HLBWH)*
• Duirwaigh
• Ed Beard Jr
• Elisabeth Fredriksson
• Haley Bush
• Jena DellaGrottaglia
• Klaudia Senator
• LouiJoverArt
• Mai Autumn
• Random Galaxy
• Matt Bailey
• Zombie Makeout Club
*QA CHECKER TOOL*
What it does:
*Upload* — you drop an Amazon flat file (.csv) into the UI
*Auto-detect channel* — reads the filename to determine the marketplace (UK, US, DE, FR, IT, ES, etc.)
*Local QA checks* — instantly flags issues in the CSV itself:
• *Title*: ALL CAPS, missing "Head Case Designs", too long (>200 chars), no recognized product type
• *Encoding*: mojibake characters, broken ? between letters
• *Material*: wrong material for the product type (e.g. TPU expected for gel cases)
Missing price, colour, phone model fields
• *DB validation (optional)* — hits your MySQL database to cross-check:
Price in the CSV vs. the expected price from the DB
Description in the CSV vs. the DB reference template
• *Results table* — shows pass/fail per SKU with expandable issue details, a side-by-side description diff viewer, and summary stats (pass rate, error/warning counts)

reports.rawMessage:
*Listing Team EOD - Chadle Rei Miclat- 3.6.2026*

Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary:
	The report highlights bigcommerce listings of more NBA teams for B6/B7/DM. Some no case available listings have been temporarily discontinued. 397 folders of discontinued brands from the S3 server have been deleted. The listing tool for BigCommerce has been tweaked for no case available models.
*BIGCOMMERCE*
*Listed*
• HTP/HB4 - WFCPHKT25-CAS, WFCPHKT25-FEL
• HDMWH-900X400X4-NFLCHB
• HDMWH-(All Sizes)-NFLTET-FOO
• NBA (HB6CR #2, HB7BK #2)
• NBA (HB6CR #3, HB7BK #3)
• NBA (HDM #2)
• NBA (HDM #3)
• NBA (HDM #4)
• NBA (HDM #5)
• NBA (HDM #6)
• NBA (HDM #7)
*Temporarily Discontinued*
• Feedonomics is pushing these models to Amazon:
• HB6CR-IPH15PLUS
• HTPCR-IPHSE4
• HTPCR-S911X
*DEVELOPMENT*
*S3 Lineup/Design/Model deletion tool progress update*
• Deleted the folders for its discontinued lineups, brands include:
• ALES, AMAN, ATM, BLAZ, CAGR, CLGAL, CMIX, CPOP, CWIN, DAWG, DBRO, DFUH, DKLE,
• EFTY, EKUL, EMOJ, EXIL, FBOD, FNAF, FRAZ, GIRO, GRAH, ICC, INTM, JBAD, JBUL, JIMB, JJOD, JMAL,
• KIJI, KITR, KKVI, LANT, LMIX, MAKL, MARC, MASH, MAST, MHRI, MMAN, MMIL, MROS,
• MRTI, NATW, NMAR, NUFC, OIL, OJST, PAUL, PBAR, PFUE, RCAL, RFAR, RKAL, ROMA, RVIL,
• SDEM, STFI, STREK, TFON, THOB, TNXT, TTAN, TUMM, TURN, VASR, WOCR
• Total space deleted (today’s batch): *2,793.08 GB - potential savings of 64.24 USD per month*
• Total space deleted (starting from 3-5-2026): *3,341.97 GB - potential savings of 76.86 USD per month*
• See the attached text file for the full list of lineups deleted from the /atg/ folder, along with the number of folders/files and total size deleted.
*Poli (BigCommerce)*
• Listings with UnitStatusID = 6 (Suspended) are now automatically set to zero stock, based on the database. Future listings will follow this automatic zero-stock setting.
